title: What if Shinji was as evil as Gendo
display_title: What if Shinji was as evil as Gendo
wikitext:
[]: What if Shinji was as evil as Gendo?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Jul 09, 2009 6:32 pm Topic. I think I saw this before, but the thread got locked...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jul 09, 2009 7:36 pm I don't think Gendo really is evil... But he has shown cruel tactics. I'll say if Shinji had the same... determination as Gendo, Shinji would probably have a lot more confidence and be a lot more kick ass. He would also make a lot more risky moves.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Thu Jul 09, 2009 8:27 pm Then ... Gendo would be a pointless character. Shinji would just automatically do the first think Gendo would think of telling / forcing him to do.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jul 09, 2009 8:31 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Then ... Gendo would be a pointless character.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Thu Jul 09, 2009 8:44 pm Then Shinji would be a retarded character for playing directly into them with unquestioned loyalty? Can we just agree that it's a bad idea any way you run with it? Especially if we assume Mini Gendo would have Big Gendo's entire personality. In that case, there's no reason he wouldn't be smart enough to figure out Big Gendo's true intentions anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jul 09, 2009 8:49 pm Yeah. More or less maybe.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jul 09, 2009 9:36 pm A lot more Rei touching would happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Jul 09, 2009 9:45 pm Oh God! That is priceless!!!

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Thu Jul 09, 2009 11:45 pm Shinji would murder gendo. I wqanted that to happen through the whole series. I was so certain that would be in EoE. but I was wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Fri Jul 10, 2009 7:11 am Well, he (Shinji)/Yui does bite him (Gendo) in half...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jul 10, 2009 7:18 am Agentomega wrote: Well, he (Shinji)/Yui does bite him (Gendo) in half...

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Fri Jul 10, 2009 7:52 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Agentomega wrote: Well, he (Shinji)/Yui does bite him (Gendo) in half...

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jul 10, 2009 1:23 pm Unit-01 is supposed to be Yui, right? So she all of a sudden turns to an unrestrained unit-01? But Shinji is still in Unit-01 in the tree of life thing? And- ---Brain asplodes---

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Fri Jul 10, 2009 2:13 pm I filed that whole sequence under 'Pre-Instrumentality Psychosis', in which the whole experience took place mostly inside of Gendo's head. I figured that the climax of Third Impact (and everything that had led up to that point) forced a cascade failure of Gendo's self restraint, so--faced with literally nothing to return to--he didn't have any reason left to ignore the emotions that he'd done his best to ignore for years. I've never really come to a definite conclusion as to the whole Unit-01 chomp, but I figured that was Gendo's way of committing suicide. His complete lack of self worth made him perceive the tang harbingers as something horrific rather than someone he loved. His line "This is my retribution" kind of led me to believe all this. But then he shows up in Shinji's Instrumentality, so it's difficult to say whether he actually died (and Instrumentality-Gendo was simply Shinji's perception of Gendo, which is kind of unlikely in my opinion) or if that was simply his tangification. Since I consider both EoTV and EoE to be equally valid depictions of the same event, I always lean toward the idea that the whole sequence was just Gendo's tangification, even if you don't actually see him turn to ooze.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Jul 10, 2009 2:50 pm Merridian wrote: I always lean toward the idea that the whole sequence was just Gendo's tangification, even if you don't actually see him turn to ooze.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Fri Jul 10, 2009 6:56 pm ^Also: ZERO drama with Dummy-Plug System.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Jul 10, 2009 7:25 pm Then ... Gendo would be a pointless character.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Fri Jul 10, 2009 7:38 pm Maybe I should have rephrased the topic title: What would happen if Shinji were evil?

[]:             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Fri Jul 10, 2009 9:29 pm I suppose Shinji's emotions would get the best of him, and he'd either destroy Nerv or (possibly) initiate Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sat Jul 11, 2009 7:24 pm Defectron wrote: I wouldnt say that, all that would happen is that EVA would turn into what Code Geass would be like if its plot wasn't falling apart.
